text:
and provider bed type files via the 
CCW_APR_LINK_KEY and the PRVDR_LCTN_ID). 

SHORT NAME: SPLMTL_BED_TYPE 

LONG NAME: SPLMTL_BED_TYPE 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

FILE(S): APR base 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual provider TAF 

VALUES: 0 = No 
1 = Yes 

COMMENT: The CCW_APR_LINK_KEY identifies each unique combination of submitting state entity code 
(SUBMTG_STATE_CD) and state-specific provider identifier (SUBMTG_STATE_PRVDR_ID).
